Index.title: Cueva Thalía — The experience of a timeless place

Home.meta_title: Cueva Thalía | Private troglodyte home with indoor pool — Tenerife
Home.meta_description: Unusual, premium accommodation in Tenerife, between sea and mountains. Heated indoor pool. Stay, event or retreat. Direct booking for up to 4 guests. San Miguel de Abona.
Home.hero_tagline: The experience of a timeless place
Home.hero_lead: Unusual, premium accommodation between sea and mountains. An immersive pause in south Tenerife.
Home.intro_text: More than just accommodation, Cueva Thalía is an experience: natural rock, warm water, light and silence. An intimate, fully private place designed to slow down and disconnect.
Home.pathways_title: Three ways to live the cueva
Home.pathway1_text: A private pause in Tenerife, between volcanic rock, warm water and silence.
Home.pathway2_text: A birthday, an intimate celebration, a photo shoot or a moment to share in an extraordinary place.
Home.pathway3_text: Yoga, meditation, workshops and retreats — an intimate setting to slow down and reconnect.
Home.story_p1: When Manon bought this house in San Miguel de Abona, a natural cave lay sleeping beneath the garden — invisible, untouched.
Home.story_p2: Four and a half years later, she discovered it by chance.
Home.story_p3: Cueva Thalía was born from that moment: an intimate, private place where rock, warm water and silence become an experience.
Home.promise1_text: A fully private place for every stay. Here, calm, space and intimacy are never shared.
Home.promise2_text: Built into the volcanic rock, the cave keeps a gentle, pleasant temperature in every season.
Home.promise3_text: Between the ocean, Mount Teide and the finest villages in southern Tenerife, everything is close. Except stress.
Home.pool_text: Carved into the stone, the indoor pool is a year-round relaxation space — water heated between 34 and 40 °C, built-in bench and hydro-massage. 100% private.
Home.location_intro: San Miguel de Abona, in a calm and authentic setting — about 20 minutes from beaches, restaurants and key places in south Tenerife.
Home.location_map_aria: OpenStreetMap of south Tenerife with Cueva Thalía and nearby destinations
Home.cta_title: When would you like to come?
Home.cta_subtitle: One unique place. It can only be booked once at a time.
Home.cookie_text: We use cookies to measure traffic and improve your experience. You choose what to accept.

Common.guide_placeholder: [To be written — content pending from Manon]

Sejourner.title: Stay
Sejourner.hero_subtitle: Sleep inside the rock. Wake up to warm water. Slow down, in complete privacy.
Sejourner.capacity_standard: Standard setup: up to 4 guests (queen bedroom + double sofa bed), book directly on the site.
Sejourner.capacity_group: Extended setup: up to 16 guests with up to 12 additional floor mattresses (80 × 190 cm) placed flexibly in the cave.
Sejourner.capacity_contact: For more than 4 guests, contact us by email or WhatsApp to arrange bedding and get a quote. Additional fees may apply per extra guest.
Sejourner.rate_line2: €250 / night Friday, Saturday, Sunday and public holidays.
Sejourner.rate_line3: These rates apply to the standard setup (up to 4 guests). Progressive rates available for multiple nights.
Sejourner.rate_line4: From 5 guests: direct contact required (email or WhatsApp). Groups and special setups: custom quote.
Sejourner.cta_whatsapp_quote: Request a custom quote on WhatsApp
Sejourner.included_garden: Private garden ~250 m² · sea and mountain views
Sejourner.included_linens: Sheets, towels and essential bath products
Sejourner.included_kitchen_basics: Spices, oil, tea, coffee and kitchen essentials
Sejourner.opt_surprise: Champagne, flowers or pastry on arrival
Sejourner.opt_late_checkout: Late check-out / early check-in (subject to availability)
Sejourner.private_reminder: The cave, pool, and outdoors are private with every booking.
Sejourner.seo_intro: A fully private troglodyte home in south Tenerife. Volcanic rock, heated indoor pool and a garden of about 250 m² with sea and mountain views — all reserved for your group.
Sejourner.amenity_garden: Private garden ~250 m² · sea and mountain views
Sejourner.amenity_wifi: Wi-Fi · free parking in front of the property
Sejourner.animals_note: Couples, families and calm, well-behaved pets welcome. Parents remain responsible for their children, especially around the pool.
Sejourner.faq_a1: Yes. The cave, heated pool, garden and outdoor areas are exclusively yours.
Sejourner.faq_a2: Up to 4 guests: book directly on the site (queen bedroom + double sofa bed). Beyond that, the cave can host up to 16 with extra bedding — contact us by email or WhatsApp to arrange your stay.
Sejourner.faq_a3: Between 34 and 40°C depending on season. Indoor pool, usable year-round.
Sejourner.faq_a4: You speak directly with Manon, the host — a human, personal connection before you arrive, with access to tailored options (decoration, massage, flexible check-in times).
Sejourner.faq_q5: Is air conditioning or heating needed?
Sejourner.faq_a5: No. The cave's natural structure keeps a pleasant temperature in every season.
Sejourner.faq_a6: Yes, free parking on the street in front of the property.
Sejourner.faq_q7: Can you smoke inside the cave?
Sejourner.faq_a7: No, smoking is not allowed inside the cave.
Sejourner.booking_group_text: For 5 or more guests, contact us by email or WhatsApp to arrange bedding and get a quote. The cave can host up to 16 with additional mattresses.
Sejourner.booking_noscript: Enable JavaScript to book online (up to 4 guests), or contact us by email or WhatsApp.
Sejourner.reservation_lead: Choose the number of guests, then check availability in real time.
Sejourner.capacity_details_body: Extra floor mattresses available (up to 16 guests). Contact us to arrange bedding and get a quote — additional fees may apply.
Sejourner.rates_footnote: Standard rates for up to 4 guests. Progressive rates available for multiple nights.

Evenements.title: Private Events
Evenements.hero_subtitle: A moment to share, in an extraordinary place.
Evenements.body_text: Birthday, baptism, photo shoot, small wedding or celebration with friends (hen party, marriage proposal…) — every project is reviewed with you, in respect of the place.
Evenements.groups_line2: Around 30 to 40 guests indoors depending on format. For a wedding, up to around 100 guests (indoor and outdoor). Custom quote.
Evenements.groups_line3: Custom quote via WhatsApp or email.
Evenements.seo_intro: Hire a private troglodyte home with a heated indoor pool for your event in Tenerife.
Evenements.process_1_desc: Describe your project. Personal reply within 48h.
Evenements.process_2_desc: We validate use, timing and needs.
Evenements.process_3_desc: The place is prepared for your celebration.
Evenements.formats_note: Half-day, full-day, evening or private hire formats — personalised quote after discussion.

Workshops.title: Retreats & Workshops
Workshops.hero_subtitle: A calm, private and sensory setting for yoga, meditation, workshops and retreats.
Workshops.capacity_text: Around 10 to 12 participants for yoga, meditation or seated workshops. Option to sleep up to 16 guests with additional mattresses. Half-day, full-day, evening, overnight or weekend formats — quote on request.
Workshops.seo_intro: Yoga, meditation, breathwork or creative retreats: an intimate setting for wellness professionals.
Workshops.process_2_desc: We adapt the format to the spaces.
Workshops.process_3_desc: A private, sensory place for your participants.

Reserver.sejourner_desc: Book online for up to 4 guests. Beyond that, contact us by email or WhatsApp.
Reserver.evenements_desc: Birthday, wedding, photo shoot or celebration — personalised quote after discussion.
Reserver.workshops_desc: Retreat, yoga, workshop or training — bespoke formats, quote on request.

Galerie.title: Gallery
Galerie.intro: Explore the rock, the water, the garden — and the atmosphere of the place.
Galerie.chambre_group_bedding: For group stays, extra bedding is available in the cave: twelve floor mattresses, cosy nests beneath the rock vault.
Galerie.meta_description: Discover {category} at Cueva Thalía, a private troglodyte home in Tenerife.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We are at your disposal for any inquiries.
Contact.seo_intro: Stay, event or retreat: personal reply within 48h, faster on WhatsApp. Book online for up to 4 guests on the Stay page.
Contact.response_desc: WhatsApp: quick reply · Email: within 48h · Stay: real-time calendar on the Stay page.

Histoire.title: Our History
Histoire.content_p1: The house was purchased years before the natural cave underneath was discovered. For a long time, Manon was unaware of its existence.
Histoire.content_p2: About four and a half years later, she discovered the cave by chance. A surreal surprise, a gift of life.
Histoire.content_p3: Cueva Thalía was born from this discovery: transforming a hidden space into an immersive experience, human and timeless.

BonCadeau.title: Gift Card
BonCadeau.hero_title: Offer a moment outside of time
BonCadeau.hero_lead: A gift voucher to experience Cueva Thalía: the softness of the rock, warm water and silence.
BonCadeau.hero_subtitle: An immersive experience for your loved ones.
BonCadeau.validity: Valid for a stay, a private event or a retreat.
BonCadeau.merci_lead: Your payment was received. You will receive the gift voucher by email shortly (usually within one business day).
BonCadeau.merci_note: If you have any questions, message us on WhatsApp or email contact@cueva-thalia.com with the email used for payment.
